data.title: Elizabeth Warren slams Musk for dismantling CFPB, says only Congress has the power to shut down the agency
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News B As the CFPB layoffs and crypto regulation controversy heat up, U.S. Democratic Senator Elizabeth Warren accused Musk and Trump of dismantling the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) for financial control. Warren said in an interview: "The CFPB was created by Congress, and only Congress, not Musk or Trump, has the power to close it. Musk's actions against the CFPB are like bank robbers." The CFPB was previously promoted by Elizabeth Warren in 2007 and suffered another wave of layoffs on February 13. About 100 employees received layoff notices. This move is included in the agenda of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) workforce optimization plan led by Musk. BlockBeats previously reported that on February 8, Russell Watt, director of the U.S. Office of Management and Budget (OMB), took over as acting director of the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), and officials from the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) led by Elon Musk took over and deleted the CFPB's X account that night. Musk tweeted "CFPB RIP" on the X platform on Friday afternoon with a tombstone emoji. The homepage of the CFPB official website shows a "404 page does not exist" error message, but the rest of the website is still accessible. Sources said that officials from the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) have obtained management rights to the CFPB system, including the content management system, website backend, and personnel active directory. The current atmosphere inside the CFPB is "full of frustration and anger." (Cointelegraph)

data.title: BNB Chain’s transaction fees surpassed Solana yesterday, and the total amount is more than five times that of Ethereum
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Nansen data shows that BNB Chain's daily transaction fees exceeded US$5.8 million yesterday, surpassing Solana's US$3.3 million, and the total is more than five times that of Ethereum. This is the first time since Halloween 2024 that other blockchains besides Ethereum and Solana have led the entire industry in daily transaction fees. Most of BNB Chain's activity comes from PancakeSwap, a DEX that runs on multiple chains, but most of its trading volume comes from BNB Chain. In addition, PancakeSwap ranked first in trading volume among all chain DEXs yesterday. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Mango Network Completes $13.5 Million Financing, with Ainfra Ventures, Kucoin Ventures and Others Participating
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Mango Network announced that it has completed a financing of 13.5 million US dollars, with Ainfra Ventures, Kucoin Ventures, Tido Capital, Connectico Capital, Becker Ventures, Tfund, Mobile Capital, CatcherVC and others participating in the investment. Mango Network said that the next step will be the mainnet and TGE.

data.title: Hong Kong Introduces New Regulatory Framework For Cryptocurrency Exchanges
data.description:
According to Odaily, Hong Kong is implementing a new regulatory framework for cryptocurrency exchanges, with only nine licensed exchanges currently operating, primarily serving professional investors. Hong Kong Legislative Council member Ng Kit Chuang announced that the region will introduce a licensing system for over-the-counter (OTC) cryptocurrency trading this year. The new system will require OTC platforms to comply with anti-money laundering (AML) and know-your-customer (KYC) regulations under the Anti-Money Laundering Ordinance.

Licensed entities will be permitted to conduct spot trading between virtual assets and fiat currencies. They must also register and monitor business wallets and transaction records. The Customs Commissioner will act as the regulator, responsible for license approval, routine inspections, investigating violations, and imposing penalties. Violators could face fines of up to HKD 1 million or two years of imprisonment.

Regarding KYC certification, the government suggests verifying customer identities, assessing and recording the purpose and nature of customer transactions, and continuously monitoring trading activities.

data.title: US Treasury Secretary: Still paying attention to non-tariff barriers and currency manipulation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Treasury Secretary said that he is still paying attention to non-tariff barriers and currency manipulation. A strong dollar policy does not mean that other countries can implement weak monetary policies. He will observe how trading partners respond. If Trump needs to, he will implement tariff policies. Trump hopes to achieve frictionless trade, but if other countries do not lower tariffs, U.S. tariffs may increase significantly. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Addresses Trade Barriers And Currency Manipulation
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Treasury Secretary has stated that the government continues to monitor non-tariff barriers and currency manipulation. The strong dollar policy does not imply that other countries can adopt weak currency strategies. The U.S. will observe how trade partners respond to these issues. If deemed necessary, U.S. President Donald Trump is prepared to implement tariff policies. Trump aims for frictionless trade, but if other nations do not reduce their tariffs, the United States may significantly increase its own tariffs.

data.title: GameStop May Finally Decide Not to Invest in Bitcoin
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Three sources said GameStop is exploring investments in alternative asset classes, especially cryptocurrencies and Bitcoin. GameStop's stock price rose as much as 20% in extended trading hours after the news broke. However, GameStop may ultimately decide not to make these investments, and according to one source, GameStop is still evaluating whether this makes sense for its business.
In December 2023, GameStop's board of directors approved a new "investment policy." The policy allows Cohen to manage GameStop's securities portfolio together with two independent board members and other necessary staff. All investments must comply with the guidelines of the policy, or be approved unanimously by the committee, or by a majority vote of the board of directors. (Jinshi)

data.title: Hong Kong Securities Regulatory Commission holds first virtual asset advisory panel meeting
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) held its first Virtual Asset Advisory Group (Group) meeting with licensed virtual asset trading platforms today. The Group is chaired by Dr. Ye Zhiheng, Executive Director of the Intermediaries Department of the SFC, and its members include all licensed virtual asset trading platforms, represented by their senior management. The Group will provide valuable contributions to the SFC's formulation of regulatory policies to further promote the development of a sustainable and resilient virtual asset ecosystem. By working with members, the Group will identify policy priorities and pave the way for market and regulatory development based on investor protection. (Jinshi)
